name: powernode-platform
description: Subscription management platform with Rails 8 API and React TypeScript frontend

scripts.dev:backend: cd server && bundle exec rails server -p 3001
scripts.security:backend: cd server && bundle exec rake security:all
scripts.security:frontend: cd frontend && npm audit && npm run lint:security
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd server && bundle install && bundle exec rails db:create db:migrate db:seed

author: Everett C. Haimes III
